title: The vector database bubble — or sustainable trend?
snippet: Vector databases went from niche to mainstream in 18 months. Chroma, Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus — the market is crowded. Consolidation is coming but the trend is real.
author: hn_user_diana

title: Turso ships vector search — SQLite is eating the vector DB market
snippet: SQLite-based databases are adding vector search. LibSQL, Turso, and SQLite-VSS are emerging. The trend is embedding vector search into general-purpose databases.
author: hn_user_evan
